content.en:
Coming out of the Cosmos Tower, Ye Tian refined this drop of primeval root marrow.

Rumble!!!!

The terrifying energy tempered Ye Tian's heart, but it didn't take too long for this drop of primeval root marrow to be completely refined by him.

"The heart is obviously a little stronger, the effect of the primeval root marrow is really terrifying, but it's a pity that there is only one drop!" Ye Tian muttered.

Another period of time has passed.

Ye Tian's progress is very slow, and he can even make no progress, so he can only cultivate the human race with all his strength, and let the human race give birth to more blood transformation realm as much as possible.

Of course, he also looked for opportunities in the cracks of territorial waters, but the opportunities he found were very ordinary and did not help him much.

this day.

Hayes Heavenly Ancestor came to Huanyu City to find Ye Tian.

"Hys Heavenly Ancestor, please come in!"

Ye Tian welcomed Hayes Heavenly Ancestor in.

"Endless Heavenly Ancestor, I want to invite you into the Mia Bitter Sea, are you interested?" asked Hayes Heavenly Ancestor.

"Mia Bitter Sea?"

Ye Tian frowned, he really hadn't heard of this place.

"Where is that?" Ye Tian asked.

Seeing that Ye Tian didn't know about Mia Bitter Sea, Hayes Heavenly Ancestor introduced: "Mia Bitter Sea is a treasure land that transcends the Nine Blood Transformation Realm and is transformed after death. In normal times, Mia has no way to enter the bitter sea, otherwise she will be wiped out by a terrifying force, and even nine blood transformation realms may not be able to withstand it. But now, Mia's bitter sea is in a period of calm, so we can break in and try it. "

"Is there anything good about Mia Bitter Sea?"

Ye Tian felt that there must be resources to attract him, so he would go, otherwise it would be unnecessary.

"Of course there is!" Hayes Heavenly Ancestor said: "The most precious resource in the Mia Bitter Sea is the Void Mother Liquor, and the existence that turned into the Mia Bitter Sea is called the Lord of Mia, and it is a Void Beast, so it was born after death. This Void Mother Liquor helps us refine our hearts, and the effect is not bad. "

Ye Tian and Hayes Tianzu kept chatting about Mia Bitter Sea, and he learned more and more about Mia Bitter Sea.

Even if it is a calm period, the Mia Bitter Sea is very dangerous, and the suppression of foreign creatures is very great, the higher the cultivation, the more powerful it is suppressed.

Because, even if the Nine Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor was in the calm period of Mia's Sea of Suffering, he didn't dare to break in.

Mia Bitter Sea has bred a lot of Void Demon Worms, all of which are a kind of creatures that contain the bloodline of the Void Mother Beast, and only survive in Mia's Bitter Sea, but their strength is terrifying, and there are many of them.

The only flaw is that this Void Demon Worm has very low intelligence and only relies on instinct.

But once they are besieged by the Void Demon Worm, these primordial-level geniuses will be in great danger, and they are very likely to fall there.

Therefore, the Mia Bitter Sea is known as one of the forbidden places in the territorial waters.

"Endless Heavenly Ancestor, I not only invited you, but also several primordial-level geniuses, all of whom are six blood transformation realms, we can enter there together, so we can take care of them. Hayes Heavenly Ancestor said.

"Good!"

Ye Tian agreed.

......

Somewhere in the seam of the territorial waters.

Ye Tian came here, this is the place agreed by Hayes Tianzu.

Soon, the other six primeval-level geniuses all came, all of whom were powerhouses in the seams of the territorial waters.

"These are Jueguang Heavenly Ancestor, Xingyun Heavenly Ancestor, Dark Chen Heavenly Ancestor, Shuntian Heavenly Ancestor, Dongdao Heavenly Ancestor and Ba Heng Heavenly Ancestor!" Hayes Heavenly Ancestor introduced these six primeval-level geniuses to Ye Tianyi one by one.

"This is the Endless Heavenly Ancestor!"

Hayes Tianzu introduced Ye Tian again.

"I've seen you!"

Ye Tian greeted with a fist.

Soon, he chatted with these primordial-level geniuses for a while, getting acquainted with each other, and then prepared to go to the Mia Bitter Sea.

Mia's bitter sea is far away from here in Huanyu City, but everyone is an ancient-level genius of the sixth-time Blood Transformation Realm, and their speed is no less than that of the Eighth Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor, so they are in a hurry.

After a while, they all arrived at Mia's bitter sea.

"This is Mia's Sea of Bitterness, here we are!"

Hayes Tianzu Road.

Ye Tian tried to spy on the situation inside Mia's bitter sea, but he couldn't perceive anything.

"The existence that surpassed the Nine Blood Transformation Realm would even fall!"

Ye Tian said with emotion.

"The Ancient War is too tragic, although it is for the Ancient Golden Tree, but I think it is just a flashpoint, and the later Ancient War must involve more secrets, I only know that in the Ancient War, there is more than one existence like the Lord of Mia's Transcendence Nine Blood Transformation Realm, and there is more than one who has fallen. "Dark Chen Heavenly Ancestor Dao.

They didn't discuss the topic much, and when they were ready, they broke into Mia's sea of suffering.

Rumble!!!!

As soon as they entered Mia's Sea of Bitterness, a terrifying force suppressed them, making Ye Tian and their faces change, but they quickly got used to it.

"Don't separate, or you'll be easily surrounded and killed!"

Hayes Heavenly Ancestor reminded.

The eight primeval-level geniuses didn't stand very far, moving little by little in the sea of Mia's suffering.

Abrupt!

The void shook in the distance, and one by one the Void Demon Worms appeared.

The aura of these Void Demon Worms is only equivalent to six or seven Blood Transformation Realm creatures, but this is the Mia Bitter Sea, Ye Tian and their strength cannot be exerted, but the Void Demon Worms have been increased.

"The Void Demon Worm is here, kill them!"

Hayes Heavenly Ancestor shouted.

Rumble!!!

The battle broke out in an instant, and the eight primeval-level geniuses all performed the primeval technique and went all out.

Ye Tian dealt with it with the Ancient God and Demon Fist, and did not expose the Ancient Movement, if he really couldn't bear it, he would use the Ancient Movement.

Eight primary-level geniuses joined forces, and this batch of Void Demon Worms couldn't be stopped at all, and they were quickly killed a lot, and the other Void Demon Worms fled in instinctive fear.

"Hurry up, these Void Worms will bring a large number of Void Worms. Fortunately, their intelligence is very low and their sensing range is limited, so if we leave here, it is very likely that we will avoid this group of Void Demon Worms!" said Hayes Heavenly Ancestor.

Whew!!

The eight primeval-level geniuses left quickly.

Then, they began to search for the Void Mother Liquor.

"Found a drop of Void Mother Liquor!"

The Void Mother Liquor is turquoise and has a very soft glow, making it easy to identify.

Hayes Heavenly Ancestor put away this drop of Void Mother Liquid and distributed it after it was released.

Next, Ye Tian and the others were fighting against the Void Demon Worm while looking for the Void Mother Liquid.

Mia has been in the bitter sea for a long time, and no Heavenly Ancestor has come in, so there should be a lot of Void Mother Liquor here.

this day.

Ye Tian and the others sensed ten Nine Blood Transformation Realm creatures, and they joined forces.

Here, the strength exerted by the Nine Blood Transformation Realm creatures may not be as strong as Ye Tian's.

Therefore, these ten Nine Blood Transformation Realm creatures did not make a move against Ye Tian and them.

Ye Tian and they will not go to others to make trouble, and besides, Hayes Tianzu still knows them, so he will not really tear his face.
